descriptionEn:
Network Speed Monitor & Firewall helps you view live internet speed, track data usage, add home screen speed widgets, and block unwanted app connections without root.

Monitor download and upload speed in real time, check your network status, view app connections, and control which apps can access Wi-Fi or mobile data.

Key Features

Live Network Speed Monitor
View real-time download and upload speed directly inside the app.

Home Screen Speed Widget
Add a clean network speed widget to your home screen and check internet speed at a glance.

Status Bar Speed
Show live internet speed in the notification area so you can monitor network activity anytime.

Data Usage Monitor
Track daily data usage and understand how much network traffic your device is using.

Per-app Firewall Control
Block or allow internet access for each app individually. Control Wi-Fi and mobile data separately.

No Root Required
Built with Android’s VpnService API for safe local filtering on Android devices. No root access needed.

Real-time App Connection Monitor
See which apps are making connections in real time. View domains, IP addresses, and remote servers used by your apps.

Privacy Protection
Stop background tracking, analytics, and unwanted data transfers from apps you do not trust.

Smart Firewall Rules
Create rules based on connection type, new app installs, and other app access scenarios.

Lightweight and Battery Friendly
Designed to run quietly with low resource use during everyday use.

Why choose Network Speed Monitor & Firewall?

This app combines live internet speed monitoring, data usage tracking, home screen widgets, and no-root firewall control in one simple tool.

Instead of only blocking access, it helps you understand:

how fast your internet connection is
how much data your device is using
which apps are connecting to the internet
where apps are connecting
which apps should be blocked or allowed

What you can do

View live download and upload speed
Add a network speed widget to your home screen
Show internet speed in the notification area
Track daily data usage
Block internet access for selected apps
Allow Wi-Fi only or mobile data only
Monitor live app connections
View domains, IPs, and server destinations
Control newly installed apps more easily
Improve privacy without rooting your phone

Safe by design

Network Speed Monitor & Firewall uses Android’s official VPN-based approach for local network filtering. It does not create a remote VPN connection, does not require root access, and does not modify your system.

Network analysis and filtering stay on your device.

Perfect for users who want

a live network speed monitor
an internet speed widget
a data usage monitor
a no-root firewall
a network monitor for Android
per-app internet blocking
privacy protection from trackers
better control of background data use

Download Network Speed Monitor & Firewall today and take control of your internet speed, data usage, privacy, and app connections.

descriptionEn:
SO File Viewer & 16KB Checker is a developer tool for inspecting Android native .so libraries.

Open ELF shared libraries, view architecture details, inspect program headers, check dependencies, and verify whether native libraries are compatible with Android 16KB page size requirements.

Key Features

Open .SO Files
Select and inspect Android native shared libraries directly on your device.

ELF Information
View ELF class, architecture, endianness, type, entry point, and header details.

16KB Page Size Check
Check PT_LOAD segment alignment and see whether a native library appears compatible with Android 16KB page size requirements.

Program Headers
Inspect ELF program headers, including offset, virtual address, memory size, flags, and alignment.

Dependencies
View native library dependencies such as libc++_shared.so, liblog.so, libandroid.so, and more.

Export Report
Generate a simple compatibility report for debugging or sharing with your team.

Useful For
Android NDK developers, Flutter developers, Unity developers, React Native developers, SDK integrators, and anyone who needs to inspect native libraries.

Important Notice
This app performs static analysis based on ELF file structure. A compatible result does not guarantee runtime behavior. Please also test your app on a 16KB page size device or emulator.

descriptionEn:
OBB File Opener & Extractor helps you open, inspect, and extract .obb files directly on your Android device.
If you downloaded or backed up an OBB file and do not know how to open it, this app provides a simple way to view file details, browse internal contents, and extract files when supported.
Key Features
•
Open OBB Files
•
View File Information
•
Browse OBB Contents (ZIP-based)
•
Extract Files
•
Preview Supported Content
•
Recent Files
•
Simple and Lightweight
Important Notice
This app is designed for viewing and extracting files you own or have permission to access. Please respect app copyrights, game licenses, and developer terms.
Disclaimer
OBB File Opener & Extractor is an independent utility app. It is not affiliated with any game developer, publisher, or platform owner.

descriptionEn:
DAT File Opener & Extractor helps you open, inspect, and extract DAT files directly on your Android device.

If you downloaded a .dat file and don’t know how to open it, this app provides a simple and effective way to view file details, detect possible content types, and extract files when supported.

---

🔍 Key Features

📂 Open DAT Files
Quickly browse and open .dat files from your device storage.

📊 View File Information
See file name, path, size, and other basic details in one place.

🧠 Detect File Content
DAT files can contain different types of data. This app helps identify what the file may contain, such as:
• Text
• Archives
• Media
• Binary data
• Unknown formats

📄 Preview Supported Content
If the DAT file contains readable data (such as text), you can preview it directly inside the app.

📦 Extract Files
If the DAT file contains extractable content, you can unpack and save files to your device.

⚡ Simple and Lightweight
Designed for fast and easy DAT file inspection without unnecessary complexity.

---

❓ What is a DAT file?

A DAT file is a generic data file format used by many applications, games, and systems.
Because DAT files can store different types of data, they are often difficult to open without specialized tools.

This app helps you understand and explore DAT files more easily.

---

🎯 Perfect For

• Opening unknown DAT files
• Checking downloaded DAT files
• Viewing file details
• Extracting supported contents
• Understanding what a DAT file contains

---

⚠️ Important Notes

• Not all DAT files use the same internal format
• Some DAT files may not be readable or extractable
• Results depend on how the DAT file was created

---

🚀 Get Started

Download DAT File Opener & Extractor and explore your DAT files with ease.

descriptionEn:
Minecraft RCON Admin is a remote admin app for Minecraft Java servers.

Built for server owners and moderators, it helps you manage Paper, Purpur, and other RCON-compatible Minecraft Java servers from your Android phone.

Use Minecraft RCON Admin to connect to your server, run commands, manage players, and handle common admin actions without opening your desktop.

Key features

• Connect to Minecraft Java servers with RCON
• Save and manage multiple servers
• Run remote commands from Android
• View online players
• Use quick admin actions for common tasks
• Save command history for faster access
• Manage Paper and Purpur servers more easily

Useful admin actions

• List online players
• Send announcements
• Save the world
• Enable or disable whitelist
• Stop the server safely
• Kick, ban, op, or deop players

Designed for Minecraft Java server admins

This app is made for Minecraft Java Edition server owners who want fast remote access to server commands and player management tools.

Supported servers

• Paper
• Purpur
• Pufferfish
• Other Minecraft Java servers with RCON enabled

Important note

This app is for Minecraft Java Edition servers. Bedrock / Pocket Edition is not supported.

For better security, use RCON over LAN, VPN, or a secure tunnel instead of exposing your server directly to the public internet.

descriptionEn:
Jar File Opener lets you open, inspect, and extract JAR files directly on your Android device.

Whether you downloaded a Java archive and want to view its contents, read its manifest, or extract files inside it, this app provides a simple and efficient solution.

Key Features

Open JAR files on Android
Quickly browse and select .jar files from your device storage.

View JAR file information
See file name, size, path, and archive details at a glance.

Read manifest (META-INF/MANIFEST.MF)
Inspect important metadata such as:
Main-Class
Created-By
Manifest-Version

Extract JAR contents
Unpack files and folders inside the archive to your device.

Browse archive structure
Explore files inside the JAR, including:
resources
images
text files
class files

Inspect class files inside JAR archives
When browsing class files in a JAR, you can open them and choose different ways to inspect them.

View class files in Hex
Check the raw compiled content of .class files in Hex format.

Decompile class files to Java
Decompile .class files into readable Java code for easier inspection.

Detect runnable JAR files
Check whether a JAR may be executable based on manifest entries.

Lightweight and easy to use
Designed for fast performance and a clean user experience.

What is a JAR file?

A JAR (Java Archive) file is a package format used to bundle Java applications, libraries, and resources into a single file.

This app helps you open and explore JAR files on Android without needing advanced tools.

Perfect For

Opening downloaded JAR files
Viewing manifest details
Extracting files from Java archives
Inspecting Java resources
Browsing class files inside JAR archives
Viewing class files in Hex
Decompiling class files to Java
Checking whether a JAR may be runnable

Important

This app is designed for opening, viewing, and extracting JAR files.
It does not provide a full Java runtime environment for executing JAR files.

Get Started

Download Jar File Opener and manage your JAR files easily on Android.

Class inspection and decompiler features are intended for learning, analysis, and authorized file inspection.
Please respect copyright, software licenses, and applicable laws when using these features.

descriptionEn:
Minecraft Server - MCPaper is a Minecraft server manager for Android that lets you run and manage a Minecraft Java Edition server on your phone or tablet.

Use MCPaper to host and control PaperMC, Purpur, and Pufferfish servers with a live console, player admin tools, server settings editor, and world backup features.

Run a Minecraft Java server on Android

MCPaper helps you start and manage your own Minecraft Java server directly on Android. It is designed for Paper-based Minecraft servers and gives you an easier way to control your server on mobile.

Key features
Run a Minecraft server on Android
Supports PaperMC, Purpur, and Pufferfish
Live console with colored logs
Player admin tools
Kick, ban, whitelist, and OP players
Send remote server commands
Edit RAM, port, and server.properties
World backup and restore
Mobile-friendly Minecraft server management
Live console and server tools

Monitor your server in real time with a built-in console. Read logs, watch activity, and manage common server tasks from your Android device.

Player management

Use built-in admin tools to manage players more easily. Perform common actions such as kick, ban, whitelist, and OP without needing a desktop setup.

Server settings editor

Adjust RAM, change the server port, and edit server.properties in one place for faster setup and control.

Backup and restore

Back up your Minecraft world before making changes, then restore it when needed.

Supported server types

MCPaper works with compatible PaperMC, Purpur, and Pufferfish server files.

Important

This app does not include any server JAR files.
You must download your own compatible server JAR from the official source.

MCPaper is an independent third-party app for launching and managing compatible Minecraft Java server files on Android.

Disclaimer

Minecraft, Mojang, Microsoft, PaperMC, Purpur, and Pufferfish are trademarks or property of their respective owners.

This app is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Mojang Studios, Microsoft, or PaperMC.

By downloading and using your own server software and files, you are responsible for complying with the applicable licenses and terms, including the Minecraft EULA.

descriptionEn:
Bluetooth Keyboard Mouse
You can control a PC through Bluetooth connection.
Steps:
1. Connect the computer through the phone Bluetooth
2. Open the Bluetooth button in the upper right corner of the app and select the device you want to control
3. Control the computer in the app

descriptionEn:
🚀 Pro Version Exclusive Features

- No Ads – clean and distraction-free experience
- Custom Args Support – manually input "args" parameters when running Java apps
- Java 25 Runtime – the latest version of Java with better compatibility and performance

📌 About Jre4Android Pro

Jre4Android Pro is a Java Runtime Environment (JRE) for Android that lets you run:

- Modern Java programs
- Classic J2ME apps & games (Java ME emulator/runner)
- Desktop-style Swing GUI software
- Command-line JARs and tools

Whether you’re a developer, student, or retro gamer, this app makes it simple to run Java software directly on Android.

✨ Key Features

- Run JAR files like java -jar xxx.jar
- Run .class files directly (java Hello)
- Command-line (console) mode with arguments support
- Java Swing GUI applications
- J2ME emulator/runner (Java ME JAR files & games)
- Run Spring Boot JARs on Android
- Based on Java 21

🎮 J2ME Support

Play your favorite classic Java ME mobile games and apps on Android.
Works as a J2ME emulator and runner, fully supporting MIDlet-based applications.

🖥 Swing GUI Support

Run desktop-style Swing applications with a full graphical interface.

💻 Console Mode

Use Jre4Android just like a terminal to execute Java JARs and tools with command-line arguments.

👨‍💻 For Developers & Learners

Perfect for:
- Testing Java projects
- Running command-line tools
- Learning Java programming on the go

💬 Community Support

Questions or feedback? Join our community:
👉 https://github.com/coobbi/Jre4android/discussions

This application includes functionality based on the open-source project J2ME-Loader (Apache License 2.0).

📝 Version History Highlights

- 1.8.66 - Upgrade jre21 to jre25
- 1.8.33 – Changed classpath from cache/ to files/
- 1.8.j21 – Upgraded to Java 21
- 1.8.7 – Swing UI supports touch clicking (toggle via mouse button in top-right)
- 1.8.6 – Added keyboard directional arrows (toggle via button at bottom-left in Swing UI)
- 1.8.0 – Added built-in IDE with compile-to-JAR support
- 1.7.3 – Command-line interactive interface adds tab, control, fn keys
- 1.7.2 – Multi-main method support & classpath dependencies for JAR execution

descriptionEn:
Jre4Android is a Java Runtime Environment (JRE) for Android that lets you run Java programs, old-school J2ME apps, desktop Swing GUI software, and even host Minecraft servers (PaperMC, Spigot, Bukkit) directly on your phone. It also supports running JAR files in command-line (console) mode, making it useful for both developers and retro gamers.

✨ Key Features

Run JAR files like java -jar xxx.jar

Run .class files directly (e.g., java Hello)

Run JARs in command-line (console) mode

Support for Java Swing GUI applications

Full support for J2ME (Java ME) JAR files & games

Host and run Minecraft servers (PaperMC, Spigot, Bukkit)

Run Spring Boot JARs on Android

Based on Java 17 (Pro version supports Java 25)

🎮 J2ME Support
Play your favorite classic Java ME mobile games and apps on Android.
Jre4Android also works as a Java emulator, Java runner, and J2ME emulator on Android, allowing you to launch MIDlet-based apps and enjoy retro mobile games seamlessly.

🖥 Swing GUI Support
Run desktop-style Swing applications with full graphical interface on your Android device.

💻 Console Mode
Use Jre4Android like a terminal to execute Java JARs and tools with command-line arguments.

🎮 Minecraft Server Support
Turn your Android device into a portable Minecraft server host!

Jre4Android supports running popular Java-based Minecraft server software:
• PaperMC
• Spigot
• Bukkit

You can:
• Run your own Minecraft server on Android
• Host a server for friends
• Manage server via console
• Install plugins and customize gameplay

Perfect for testing plugins, running small servers, or learning server management.

⚠️ Minecraft Server Setup Tip

When running a Minecraft server for the first time, you may need to accept the EULA (End User License Agreement).

You can do this in two ways:

1. Edit the eula.txt file and set:
eula=true

2. Or add this JVM flag in settings:
-Dcom.mojang.eula.agree=true

Make sure you agree to the official EULA before enabling this option.

👨‍💻 For Developers & Learners
Ideal for testing Java projects, running command-line tools, hosting Minecraft servers, or learning Java programming on the go.

🔗 Pro Version (Java 25 Support)

descriptionZh:
Jre4Android is a Java Runtime Environment (JRE) for Android that lets you run Java programs, old-school J2ME apps, desktop Swing GUI software, and even host Minecraft servers (PaperMC, Spigot, Bukkit) directly on your phone. It also supports running JAR files in command-line (console) mode, making it useful for both developers and retro gamers.

✨ Key Features

Run JAR files like java -jar xxx.jar

Run .class files directly (e.g., java Hello)

Run JARs in command-line (console) mode

Support for Java Swing GUI applications

Full support for J2ME (Java ME) JAR files & games

Host and run Minecraft servers (PaperMC, Spigot, Bukkit)

Run Spring Boot JARs on Android

Based on Java 17 (Pro version supports Java 25)

🎮 J2ME Support
Play your favorite classic Java ME mobile games and apps on Android.
Jre4Android also works as a Java emulator, Java runner, and J2ME emulator on Android, allowing you to launch MIDlet-based apps and enjoy retro mobile games seamlessly.

🖥 Swing GUI Support
Run desktop-style Swing applications with full graphical interface on your Android device.

💻 Console Mode
Use Jre4Android like a terminal to execute Java JARs and tools with command-line arguments.

🎮 Minecraft Server Support
Turn your Android device into a portable Minecraft server host!

Jre4Android supports running popular Java-based Minecraft server software:
• PaperMC
• Spigot
• Bukkit

You can:
• Run your own Minecraft server on Android
• Host a server for friends
• Manage server via console
• Install plugins and customize gameplay

Perfect for testing plugins, running small servers, or learning server management.

⚠️ Minecraft Server Setup Tip

When running a Minecraft server for the first time, you may need to accept the EULA (End User License Agreement).

You can do this in two ways:

1. Edit the eula.txt file and set:
eula=true

2. Or add this JVM flag in settings:
-Dcom.mojang.eula.agree=true

Make sure you agree to the official EULA before enabling this option.

👨‍💻 For Developers & Learners
Ideal for testing Java projects, running command-line tools, hosting Minecraft servers, or learning Java programming on the go.

🔗 Pro Version (Java 25 Support)
For advanced users, check out Jre4Android Pro:
https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.coobbi.jre.pro

💬 Community Support
Questions or feedback? Join our community:
https://github.com/coobbi/Jre4android/discussions

Notes
This application includes functionality based on the open-source project J2ME-Loader (Apache License 2.0).
